meta.title: AI Dev 25 x NYC | Phillip Snalune: AI Upskilling: A Framework Agnostic Playbook to Scale Adoption
meta.description:
Industry leaders agree: the missing layer in enterprise AI is hands-on, immersive learning. 

In this session, Codio founder Phillip Snalune, Co-Founder & CEO of Codio, shared new industry insights, quantified today's skills gaps, and walked attendees through a framework-agnostic playbook to ensure adoption scales with proficiency.

--------------

Join us at AI Dev 26 x San Francisco! Tickets: https://ai-dev.deeplearning.ai/
